nasb.text: “Then you shall take fine flour and bake twelve cakes with it; two-tenths of an ephah shall be in each cake.

esv.text: “You shall take fine flour and bake twelve loaves from it; two tenths of an ephah shall be in each loaf.

cnv.text: “你要取細麵烤成十二個餅，每一個餅用兩公斤細麵。

ccb.text: “你要用细面粉烤十二个饼，每个饼用两公斤细面粉。
